items.name: config
items.title: OpenPolicy Config
items.description: Starter openpolicy.ts config file for defining your privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie policy.

items.name: policy-components
items.title: Policy Components
items.description: Tailwind-styled renderer components for OpenPolicy documents.

items.name: privacy-policy
items.title: Privacy Policy
items.description: A Tailwind-styled privacy policy component powered by OpenPolicy.
items.docs: Remeber to wrap your compoents in the `<OpenPolicy>` provider. https://openpolicy.sh/docs/react

items.name: terms-of-service
items.title: Terms of Service
items.description: A Tailwind-styled terms of service component powered by OpenPolicy.
items.docs: Remeber to wrap your compoents in the `<OpenPolicy>` provider. https://openpolicy.sh/docs/react

items.name: cookie-policy
items.title: Cookie Policy
items.description: A Tailwind-styled cookie policy component powered by OpenPolicy.
items.docs: Remeber to wrap your compoents in the `<OpenPolicy>` provider. https://openpolicy.sh/docs/react
